title: DankHelper
description: A specialized mod that collects your stats for DankPrison.com
body:
This is a simple mod meant to help you collect and visualize your stats on a Minecraft Prison server. **This mod does not work on any server except DankPrison.com**

This mod is not affiliated or officially endorsed by DankPrison.com or Dank420Girl, but production and use of the mod has been approved by her.

The mod places a repositional and configurable HUD on your screen showing stats such as, average income per minute, average spending per minute, total momentum and fortune gains, and more.

![A preview of the HUD](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/7c106eb8c5cf238bcb35fc021f5bde10fc4d4a2f.png)

The mod also saves your session, champion frenzy, and fishing frenzy stats in CSV files in your `.minecraft/dankhelper` directory. You can view your trends from those files in-game by pressing `PG Down`.

![A preview of the Trends view](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/39baf08e3dd1042088b57c9f3fac4a3563d2177d_0.webp)
